name: WESTWATER RESOURCES, INC.
summary: Westwater Resources, Inc. is a battery-grade graphite processing company focused on developing the Kellyton Graphite Plant near Kellyton, Alabama, and the Coosa Graphite Deposit near Rockford, Alabama. The company produces ULTRA-CSPG (coated spherical purified graphite) using a patented process for use as Active Anode Material in electric vehicle batteries. It also produces graphite fines as a byproduct of the spheroidizing process.

products.name: ULTRA-CSPG
products.description: Proprietary coated spherical purified graphite produced via patented process for use as Active Anode Material in EV batteries.

products.name: Graphite Fines
products.description: Natural graphite fines material produced during the CSPG spheroidizing process, sold under offtake agreement.

products.name: SG Fines
products.description: Spherical graphite fine material produced from SG milling at the Kellyton Graphite Plant.

partnerships.description: Products Procurement Agreement with EV battery developer and manufacturer supplying Ford, Hyundai, Volkswagen and others.
Binding offtake agreement dated September 17, 2024 for supply of the Company's graphite fines material.
Binding Offtake Agreement dated July 17, 2024, terminated November 3, 2025, with Stellantis EV manufacturer.
2024 Purchase Agreement for equity financing; Company may issue up to 600,000 additional commitment shares per purchase.
At The Market Offering Agreement dated August 30, 2024 for equity sales.
